---
title: "AI in Cultural Collections"
---

This is a rough draft website, intended to provide a toolkit for researchers working with Cultural Collections in the use of AI.

The aim of this web resource is to provide an evolving source of guidance for ethical use of AI in research.

The guide is split into two main sections:

- [Guidance](guidance/index.qmd): principles to consider and follow when considering implementing AI into your workflow. The guidance is split between guidelines for individual readers, and for institutions.
- [Toolkit](tools/index.qmd): practical tools and resources to help you implement the guidance above.

The current version of the guidance that you're viewing is: **v0.1.0**.

This website is designed to be easily *forked* (copied) and modified for your institution.
